generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Virtual permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Virtual gearwheel in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Virtual cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance FirstAxisDTEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisDigitalShadow, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox of the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current in the first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection leading to adjustments in robot control algorithms"
]

instance MotionAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control algorithms to compensate for friction loss",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights from SysML"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization insights"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights from AAS"
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of robot axis using SysML",
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot axis data in dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustments to robot control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAdjustmentAction
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shell",
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural description of robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulating friction models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from the first axis motor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity derived from position encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data from current and position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis structural model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for robot joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for robot joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for robot joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for robot joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TwinningProcessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology including problem identification, asset and model analysis, use of calculations/models, and data identification follows reference model concretization steps",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for live measurements during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components, digital shadow with engineering models, simulation models, data traces, processing components, and dashboard for unified visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, using live operational data for friction analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data to validate friction models; white-box and black-box models used for accuracy improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
